name: Symphony of Blades
location: Symphony of Blades in Depths of Malatar, Urgarlag Chief-bane

bonuses.stat:
When you heal a group member who is under 50% of their primary resource, grant them Meridia's Favor, which restores 13-570 Magicka or Stamina every 1 second for 6 seconds. This effect can occur every 18 seconds per target.

This effect cannot target yourself, and the resource returned is based off the target's highest maximum resource.
